name: Purchase Invoice Capitalization Check
Generate Asset QR
script:
import frappe
import qrcode
import io

# Generate Maintenance Log URL with asset parameter
qr_data = frappe.utils.get_url() + "/app/asset-maintenance-log/new-asset-maintenance-log?asset=" + doc.name

# Create QR image
img = qrcode.make(qr_data)

buffer = io.BytesIO()
img.save(buffer, format="PNG")

# Create file attachment
file_doc = frappe.get_doc({
    "doctype": "File",
    "file_name": f"{doc.name}_qr.png",
    "content": buffer.getvalue(),
    "attached_to_doctype": "Asset",
    "attached_to_name": doc.name
})

file_doc.insert(ignore_permissions=True)

# Save QR image link to asset
doc.asset_qr_code = file_doc.file_url
doc.save(ignore_permissions=True)
